title: Immunohistochemical Staining of Heparan Sulfate and Collagen Type XVIII in Human Islets
author: Lora Starrs

steps.title: Deparaffinize slides in each xylene for 1 min
steps.instruction: Deparaffinize slides in each xylene for 1 min. rehydrate slides in graded alcohols beginning in absolute ethanol (10 dips)/ container of absolute ethanol), followed by 90% ethanol (10 dips) and 70% ethanol (10 dips). Wash well in running tap water for 5 min.

steps.title: Wipe around sections with a tissue,...
steps.instruction: Wipe around sections with a tissue, encircle the sections using a diamond pencil and place in a slide container of tap water (250 ml).

steps.title: Block endogenous peroxidase activity by incubating...
steps.instruction: Block endogenous peroxidase activity by incubating sections in 3% hydrogen peroxide in methanol (25 ml 30% H 2 O 2 + 225 ml methanol) for 10 min.

steps.title: Wash 2 x 2 min in...
steps.instruction: Wash 2 x 2 min in 250 ml phosphate-buffered saline (PBS) followed by wash in running tap water for 5 min.

steps.title: Prewarm slide tray containing low level...
steps.instruction: Prewarm slide tray containing low level of water (to humidify) in 37°C incubator.

steps.title: Prepare 0
steps.instruction: Prepare 0.5 mg/ml (0.05%) pronase (#537088 Calbiochem; for antigen retrieval to expose HS epitopes): 2.5mg pronase in 5 ml deionized water.

steps.title: Wipe around sections using tissue and...
steps.instruction: Wipe around sections using tissue and cover each section with pronase solution. Incubate sections in a humidified slide tray at 37°C (incubator) for 10 min.

steps.title: Wash slides for 2 x 2...
steps.instruction: Wash slides for 2 x 2 min in 250 ml PBS.

steps.title: Wipe around sections using tissue
steps.instruction: Wipe around sections using tissue. Block non-specific binging of Ig: (i) For HS immunostaining, apply animal free block (diluted to 20% v/v with deionized water) to tissue sections and incubate for 5 min at room temperature. (ii) For Col18 immunostaining, apply diluted protein concentrate and incubate for 5 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Tip off excess block in Step...
steps.instruction: Tip off excess block in Step 9(i) or 9(ii), wipe around sections using tissue and incubate with 0.2 mg/ml anti-HS mAb (or 0.2 mg/ml mouse IgM as isotype control; diluted in protein concentrate solution) and incubate for 1 hour or incubate with 2 μg/ml anti-col18 mAb (or 2 μg/ml mouse IgG 2bκ as isotype control; diluted in protein concentrate solution), 125-150 μl/section at room temperature for 30 min.

steps.title: Wash off primary antibody with PBS...
steps.instruction: Wash off primary antibody with PBS and transfer slides to slide container with 250 ml PBS. Wash 2 x 2min.

steps.title: Wipe around sections using tissue and...
steps.instruction: Wipe around sections using tissue and incubate with 26 μg/ml secondary HRP-rabbit anti-mouse Ig, 130-150 μl/section, for 30 min at room temperature. (Alternatives: 3.2 μg/ml secondary HRP-rabbit anti-mouse IgM (for HS); 3.2 μg/ml secondary HRP-rabbit anti-mouse IgG (for Col18)).

steps.title: Wash off secondary antibody with PBS...
steps.instruction: Wash off secondary antibody with PBS and transfer to slide container with 250 ml PBS. Wash slides 2 x 2min.

steps.title: Prepare AEC working solution
steps.instruction: Prepare AEC working solution: 4.75 ml acetate buffer (see Guidelines), 0.25ml AEC stock solution and 25 μl 3% H 2 O 2 . Filter using a disposable 0.2 μm filter. Use within 2 hours of preparation, refrigerate for short-term storage. Protect from light.

steps.title: Wipe around sections using tissue and...
steps.instruction: Wipe around sections using tissue and cover the sections with AEC solution for 30 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash off AEC solution with deionized...
steps.instruction: Wash off AEC solution with deionized water and transfer slides to slide container with 250 ml deionized water. Wash 3x in 10min.

steps.title: Lightly counterstain with Gill’s hematoxylin, wash...
steps.instruction: Lightly counterstain with Gill’s hematoxylin, wash in deionized water (2 x) and briefly dip in ammonium water (100 μl ammonia in 250 ml deionized water), 2 x 2 sec. Wash in deionized water (2 x in 250 ml) and coverslip using glycergel mounting medium.

steps.title: Image sections using a light microscope with camera attachment
steps.instruction: Image sections using a light microscope with camera attachment. Use Image J software with color deconvolution plugin to determine % of islet area stained.
